before_code:
module adder_8bit (
  input logic [7:0] a,
  input logic [7:0] b,
  input logic cin,
  output logic cout,
  output logic [7:0] sum_out
);

  always @(a) begin
    {cout, sum_out} = a + b + cin;
  end

endmodule
after_code:
module adder_8bit (
  input logic [7:0] a,
  input logic [7:0] b,
  input logic cin,
  output logic cout,
  output logic [7:0] sum_out
);

  always @(a or b or cin) begin
    {cout, sum_out} = a + b + cin;
  end

endmodule
